name: gemma-san-deep
voice: A seductive low, breathy young woman's voice. A deeper chest register, smooth and velvety with a breathy, mischievous succubus purr; warm and confident, unhurried and knowing in delivery, a slow smile in the tone.
description: Authored in the editor's voice preset editor.
ref_text: Fufu~ welcome back, darling. Today we are breaking a game older than some of you, and I intend to enjoy every single second of it.
